nodes.label: Brand Identity Pattern (BrandMark / BrandWordmark / LiventoLogo duplication)
nodes.norm_label: brand identity pattern (brandmark / brandwordmark / liventologo duplication)

nodes.label: Server Component First Pattern
nodes.rationale: Default to Server Components; add 'use client' only when state, effects, event handlers, or browser APIs are needed. This minimizes client JS bundle size.

nodes.label: Push use client as Deep as Possible
nodes.rationale: Isolate interactive parts into small Client Components so the rest of the tree stays server-rendered and excluded from the JS bundle.
nodes.norm_label: push use client as deep as possible

nodes.label: Tailwind v4 CSS-first Configuration
nodes.rationale: All design tokens go in globals.css via @theme, not in tailwind.config.js which does not exist in v4. @import 'tailwindcss' replaces @tailwind directives.

nodes.label: Next.js 16 params as Promise
nodes.rationale: In Next.js 16, params and searchParams are Promises and must be awaited. Destructuring them directly as in v13/14 will throw at runtime.

nodes.label: Three-Layer Styling Pattern
nodes.rationale: Tailwind for layout/spacing/typography, globals.css semantic classes for complex visual effects, inline style only for dynamic runtime values. Never mix layers.

nodes.label: Component Colocation Rule
nodes.rationale: Components used by one route go in app/route/_components/. Components shared by 2+ routes go in components/. Do not pre-emptively move to components/.
